subsections.title: SafeApp
subsections.description: Developed a system for signing, verifying, encrypting & decrypting emails without storing decryption or signing keys on a central server.

subsections.title: Imbellus
subsections.description: Created a browser-based, live visual editor for 3d interactive scenarios used in education and hiring skill assessments.
Architected a system allowing creation of individual tasks with independent dependencies in browser, and automatically generating the back end.

subsections.title: Skrumble
subsections.description: Build a proof-of-concept peer-to-peer video conferencing system supporting 18 simultaneous video clients without a media server - doubling the leading-at-the-time peer-to-peer system, and more than quadrupling the normal limit of 3-4 clients.
Architected a scalable, cloud-based back end with multi-tenancy - replacing the original VM-per-customer system.

subsections.title: Subject Matter Expert - McMaster Continuing Education
subsections.description: Designing and writing a course on backend development for McMaster's Full-Stack Development program.

subsections.title: Stealth Contract
subsections.description: Built a tool for generating a complex, interactive site using a Figma design and CSV data directly from the browser - allowing the client to easily update content without developer input. Collaborated to add features easing their workflow and improving the end-user experience on the generated site.

subsections.title: SafeApp (getsafeapp.com)
subsections.description: Designed, architected and built a chrome extension for signing & encrypting Gmail emails, along with the back-end services on Firebase. Provided guidance and support to an additional developer who joined near the end of my contract, to allow them to take over the project.

subsections.title: Harvard Business School
subsections.description: Built a visual tool for generating input data used by the an earthquake cycle imaging system. Collaborated with the researchers to create a tool that eases their workflow, and set up infrastructure and documentation to allow them to continue maintaining it reliably.

subsections.title: Emile Technologies
subsections.description: Migrated their chatbot from a discontinued service to Firebase, re-implementing many of it's features, while mentoring the client to allow them to continue maintenance independently.

Designed a server system that can be controlled by the visual editor - allowing for logic to run in-browser during editing, and on the server when deployed with no additional engineering. Improved communication between Javascript & Unity. Assisted in the implementation of legacy assessments. Build a web-component based wrapper for isolated, independently deployable tasks running through configurable pages with a single server connection.

Created a custom CMS during downtime, removing the need for a full-time developer maintaining our website. Assisted in transitioning from hand-maintained VMs to automated LXD containers. Lead back-end feature development and operations. Developed a graph-based phone IVR system. Designed and built a cloud-based, scalable VOIP/Video Conferencing system to replace our original stack of dedicated servers.
